g.text: Derivative of sum: both inputs receive full upstream gradient
Local derivative is sibling's VALUE (not gradient)
Power: c = a ** n (n is constant int/float)
Implemented as a + (-b), derivative of -b is -1
Division: c = a / b (via a * b**-1)
Implemented as a * (b**-1), chain rule applies
t is cached output value; avoids recomputing exp()
Dead neuron: if a ≤ 0 always, gradient is 0 forever
